other_observers: Nicholas Weber; I am the original finder & identifier
description: Size: about 5", or smaller than a dark-eyed junco but larger than a kinglet. Shape: slender bird compared to a junco; a much longer thin bill & much longer tail compared to a kinglet' Plumage: overall yellowish below & greyish above;head with yellow spectacles around eyes & faint ear patch; throat bright yellow & belly white; sides with faint streaking; undertail coverts white; back olive grey with no streaking; pair of white wing bars evident.Behaviors: Bird fed on black oil sunflower seeds & on suet; this is consistent with pine warbler food selection at feeders elsewhere in winter.Call: not givenPlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Peter G Weber, Peter G Weber, Peter G Weber
